data.description: Provider-neutral payload. text_delta carries visible text; thinking_delta carries hidden thinking/status; tool_start/tool_result carry bounded tool lifecycle data; retry/checkpoint/side_effect_reused carry reliability markers; interrupt/resume carry Stage 05 HITL state; done and error carry terminal metadata. Payloads may include redacted provider, skill, retry, failure, lock, and replay metadata, but must not include raw provider secrets.
